entity.summary: Solana liquidity and exchange protocol providing dynamic-liquidity-market-maker pools, constant-product automated market makers, bonding curves, token swaps, liquidity provisioning, launch infrastructure, and developer interfaces.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation presents Meteora as active Solana liquidity infrastructure. Its current product set includes DLMM, DAMM v2, dynamic bonding curves, direct pool swaps, liquidity provisioning, launch tools, SDKs, APIs, and a live application. No exact launch date or legal jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: We Build Liquidity Pools
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes current Solana liquidity infrastructure including DLMM, DAMM v2, dynamic bonding curves, liquidity pools, public APIs, SDKs, launch tools, and a linked application.

evidence.title: How to Swap Tokens on Meteora
evidence.notes: First-party user guide documents current swaps through Meteora pools and its integrated interface, including wallet connection, pool liquidity, price impact, slippage, fees, and direct swap tabs for DLMM and DAMM pools.
